title: pleiotaxis decipiens
intro: Pleiotaxis decipiens, also known as the Decumbent Pleiotaxis or Decumbent Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant is native to Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pleiotaxis decipiens include its potential to reduce fever, relieve headaches, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used internally or applied topically to the affected area.
